message:
🐛 Add user-facing error feedback for insight storage failures (#2341)

Upgrade console.warn to console.error in loadSet/saveSet catch blocks
and show an error toast to users when saving insight preferences fails
(e.g., due to full browser storage). This ensures storage errors are
no longer silently swallowed.

Fixes #2322

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
